name: fractalai
description: A web-based fractal generator using regl and WebGL

scripts.dev:network:
node scripts/generate-presets-manifest.js && node -e "import os from 'node:os'; const port=5173; const ifaces=os.networkInterfaces(); const ips=Object.values(ifaces).flat().filter(Boolean).filter((i)=>i.family==='IPv4' && !i.internal).map((i)=>i.address); const ip=ips[0]||'localhost'; console.log('
Network preview:
- Local:   http://localhost:' + port + '/
- Network: http://' + ip + ':' + port + '/
');" && vite --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5173
scripts.build: node scripts/generate-presets-manifest.js && NODE_ENV=production npx vite build && NODE_ENV=production node scripts/compress-brotli.js
scripts.build:prod: NODE_ENV=production node scripts/generate-presets-manifest.js && NODE_ENV=production vite build && NODE_ENV=production node scripts/compress-brotli.js
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run stylelint
scripts.check:all: npm run test && npm run lint && npm run stylelint
